adapterRun.summary: Synapse environment metadata loaded, but bootstrap is blocked by a missing local setup script.
notes: Confirmed the project bootstrap command remains `sh scripts/local/setup_local_env.sh`.
Checked for `scripts/local/*.sh` and found no matching local scripts in this checkout.
Ran `sh scripts/local/setup_local_env.sh`, which failed with exit code 127 because the script does not exist.
Ran `npm run validate:synapse-example`, which passed and confirmed the onboarding configuration is structurally valid.
No repository source files were modified.

errors.message: Verification command `sh scripts/local/setup_local_env.sh` failed because `scripts/local/setup_local_env.sh` does not exist in the repository checkout.
